expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated in the report
expectations.evidence: The report summary shows '전체 (33항목)' and the CSV contains rows numbered 1 through 33, each with a verdict (pass/fail/partial/NA).

expectations.text: Semantic HTML review section is included in the report
expectations.evidence: The HTML report contains a '시맨틱 HTML 검토' section with 7 sub-items (랜드마크 요소, 섹션 구조, 대화형 요소, 목록 구조, 표현용 태그, 폼 그룹, 기타 시맨틱 요소). The CSV also includes rows labeled 시맨틱-1 through 시맨틱-7.
Multiple file:line references found throughout the report: page.tsx:83, StatsCard.tsx:10-17, page.tsx:59, page.tsx:62, Navbar.tsx:59-72, StatsCard.tsx:13, page.tsx:47, etc.

expectations.text: report.html file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.html exists in the outputs directory and contains a full 530-line HTML accessibility report.

expectations.text: report.csv file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.csv exists in the outputs directory with 41 rows (header + 33 KWCAG items + 7 semantic HTML items).

expectations.text: Detected missing alt attribute on img in dashboard/page.tsx
expectations.evidence: Item 1 (적절한 대체 텍스트) is marked ❌ with: 'page.tsx:83 — alt 속성 누락'.

expectations.text: Detected icon buttons without aria-label in dashboard/page.tsx
expectations.evidence: Item 23 (레이블과 네임) is marked ❌ with: 'page.tsx:59,62 — 새로고침·설정 아이콘 버튼에 aria-label 없음'.

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id='stat-card' issue in StatsCard.tsx
expectations.evidence: Item 32 (마크업 오류 방지) is marked ❌ with: 'StatsCard.tsx:13 — id="stat-card" 하드코딩. 3개 인스턴스 렌더링 시 동일 id 3개 중복 생성'.

expectations.text: Lighthouse-mapped items show verdict method as Lighthouse, not 정적분석
expectations.evidence: Only item 25 (기본 언어 표시) uses 'Lighthouse' as its verdict method. All other potentially Lighthouse-mapped items (e.g., items 1, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 23) show '정적분석' instead. The report states that Lighthouse was limited because the dashboard redirected to a login page, so 10 items fell back to 정적분석.

expectations.text: Browser-target items (A-10, A-11, A-33) show verdict method as Playwright, not 판정불가
expectations.evidence: Items 10 (키보드 사용 보장), 11 (초점 이동과 표시), and 33 (웹 애플리케이션 접근성 준수) all show '정적분석' as their verdict method, not 'Playwright'. The report explicitly states '브라우저 검증(agent-browser): 미사용 — npx agent-browser 설치 불가'.
